title: Creamy Carbonara
description: A classic Roman pasta dish with eggs, cheese and crispy pancetta. Ready in under 30 minutes.
steps: Boil a large pot of salted water and cook spaghetti until al dente.
Fry pancetta in a pan until crispy then remove from heat.
Whisk eggs and grated parmesan together in a bowl.
Drain pasta and add to the pancetta pan off the heat.
Pour egg mixture over pasta and toss quickly until creamy.
Season with black pepper and serve immediately.

title: Avocado Toast
description: Quick and healthy breakfast with creamy avocado on toasted sourdough. Perfect for busy mornings.
steps: Toast the sourdough slices until golden and crispy.
Cut the avocado in half, remove the pit and scoop into a bowl.
Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt and pepper.
Spread generously onto the toast.
Top with chili flakes and serve immediately.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Rich and creamy Indian curry with tender chicken in a spiced tomato and coconut sauce.
steps: Cut chicken into chunks and marinate with garam masala and turmeric for 30 minutes.
Fry diced onion, garlic and ginger in oil until soft and golden.
Add canned tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add marinated chicken and cook through for 15 minutes.
Stir in coconut cream and simmer for 5 more minutes.
Serve hot with rice or naan bread.

title: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine lettuce with classic Caesar dressing, parmesan shavings and golden croutons.
steps: Wash and dry the romaine lettuce then chop into bite-sized pieces.
Add lettuce to a large bowl and drizzle with Caesar dressing.
Squeeze in lemon juice and toss well to coat.
Top with parmesan shavings and croutons.
Season with black pepper and serve immediately.

title: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm chocolate cake with an irresistible gooey melted center. The ultimate indulgent dessert.
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C and butter 4 ramekins generously.
Melt dark chocolate and butter together in a bowl over hot water.
Whisk eggs and sugar together until pale and fluffy.
Fold the melted chocolate into the egg mixture.
Fold in flour and salt until just combined.
Pour into ramekins and bake for exactly 12 minutes.
Turn out onto plates immediately and serve warm.

title: Tom Yum Soup
description: Spicy and sour Thai soup with juicy prawns, lemongrass and mushrooms in a fragrant broth.
steps: Bring chicken stock to a boil with lemongrass stalks and lime leaves.
Add mushrooms and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add prawns and cook until they turn pink.
Season with fish sauce, lime juice and chili paste.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot garnished with fresh coriander.

title: Shakshuka
description: Eggs poached in a rich spiced tomato and pepper sauce. A hearty Middle Eastern breakfast.
steps: Fry diced onion and pepper in oil until softened.
Add garlic, cumin and paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in canned tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
Make 4 wells in the sauce and crack an egg into each.
Cover and cook until egg whites are set but yolks are still runny.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve with crusty bread.

title: Chicken Ramen
description: Deep and rich Japanese noodle soup with tender chicken slices, soft boiled egg and fresh toppings.
steps: Bring Chicken stock to a simmer and whisk in miso paste and soy sauce.
Sear Chicken sirloin in a hot pan for 2 minutes each side then slice thinly.
Cook ramen noodles according to packet instructions.
Divide noodles into bowls and pour hot broth over.
Top with beef slices, halved soft boiled eggs and nori.
Garnish with spring onions and a drizzle of sesame oil.
